nasb.text: Being at a loss how to investigate such matters, I asked whether he was willing to go to Jerusalem and there stand trial on these matters.

esv.text: Being at a loss how to investigate these questions, I asked whether he wanted to go to Jerusalem and be tried there regarding them.

cnv.text: 關於這些爭論，我不知道怎樣處理，就問他願不願意上耶路撒冷去為這些事在那裡受審。

ccb.text: 我不知如何审理这些事情，就问被告是否愿意上耶路撒冷受审。

csbs.text: 我对这些辩论也心里困惑，就问保罗是否愿意上耶路撒冷去，在那里为这些事受审。
